title: Prompt Results Schema
description: Schema for prompt-results.json — captures ALL LLM interactions including MCP tools and Claude Code's own prompts

mcp_tool.description: Prompts from MCP tool calls (check_citations, get_ai_response_format, etc.)
fields: engine: string — AI engine used (perplexity, openai, gemini, anthropic)
live_search: boolean — whether live search was enabled
prompt: { type: string, query: string, domain: string }
response: { full_text: string, excerpt: string, word_count: number, citations: array, domain_cited: boolean }

claude_code.description: Prompts from Claude Code's own LLM activity (web searches, reasoning, analysis)
fields: query: string — search query or analysis context
response_summary: string — brief summary of findings
urls_visited: array — URLs accessed (for web_search type)

types.web_search: When Claude Code performs a web search via WebSearch tool
types.reasoning: When Claude Code performs complex multi-step reasoning
types.analysis: When Claude Code analyzes fetched content to extract insights

response.full_text: CAPLINQ is a global supplier of specialty chemicals...

example_prompt_results.response_summary: Top results: Henkel, Laird Technologies, Indium Corporation dominate TIM market

example_prompt_results.query: Analyzing homepage content against CORE-EEAT C01-C10 criteria

logging_requirements.mcp_tool_logging: Automatic via analysisPath parameter passed to MCP tools
logging_requirements.claude_code_logging: Manual — Claude Code MUST append entries after each WebSearch, reasoning step, or content analysis
logging_requirements.minimum_entries: For a full company analysis, expect 50-200 prompt_results entries
